name: IMAC Holdings, Inc.
summary: Overview We provide services related to proteomic products that identify and support oncology clinical treatment decisions and biopharmaceutical drug development. Until recently, we were a holding company for IMAC Regeneration Centers, The BackSpace retail stores and our Investigational New Drug division, providing movement and orthopedic therapies and minimally invasive procedures to improve the physical health of patients at locations we owned or managed.
